basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Sr. Project Scientist Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply by sending their application via Email. The last date to send the application email is 02-07-2026.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Tech./MS(R)/MCA with First Class or equivalent in a computing-related discipline OR B.Tech. in a computing-related discipline 1st class with a minimum of three years of relevant experience.
qualification.details: Sr. Project Scientist: M.Tech./MS(R)/MCA with First Class or equivalent in a computing-related discipline OR B.Tech. in a computing-related discipline 1st class with a minimum of three years of relevant experience.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Delhi Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 02-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Delhi Sr. Project Scientist Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Sr. Project Scientist position at IIT Delhi?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your application via email for the Sr. Project Scientist position at IIT Delhi is 02-07-2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated email address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the educational qualifications required for the Sr. Project Scientist role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Tech./MS(R)/MCA with First Class or equivalent in a computing-related discipline. Alternatively, a B.Tech. in a computing-related discipline with 1st class and a minimum of three years of relevant experience is also accepted.

faq.question: Q3. How can I apply for the Sr. Project Scientist vacancy?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to download the application form from the IRD Website, fill it completely, and send it to Prof. Naveen Garg at [email protected] with the advertisement number in the subject line.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Sr. Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: The salary for the Sr. Project Scientist position ranges from Rs. 60,750 to Rs. 79,260/- per month, plus HRA at 30%.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies for the Sr. Project Scientist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Sr. Project Scientist position at IIT Delhi as per the released notification.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, under the 'Official Notification PDF' description.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this Sr. Project Scientist position?
faq.answer: The job type for this Sr. Project Scientist position is project-based, indicating it is tied to a specific research project.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the job?
faq.answer: The job is located at the Indian Institute of Technology Delhi, New Delhi, Delhi - 110016.

faq.question: Q10. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is IITD/IRD/150/2026.
